notes: Adds a brief Other use note to cards in the Other Uses route so the list explains why each species appears there.

Other-use card snippets now prioritize utility, emergency/survival, field-identification, comparison, tinder, decorative, invasive-awareness, and traditional-use notes instead of generic overview text.
Tightens inferred other-use keyword matching so ordinary mushroom phrases about ink/inky aging or a food basket do not create false Other Uses listings by themselves.
No species source, image, or edible-route promotion changes.
